description: Verify that a user can log in successfully with valid username and password
steps: Enter valid username 'student' in username field
Enter valid password 'Password123' in password field
expected_result: User successfully logs in and sees the dashboard

test_name: Successful Login with Valid Credentials (Alternative Path)
description: Verify that a user can log in successfully with valid username and password using an alternative path
steps: Navigate to login page via URL 'https://practicetestautomation.com/practice-test-login/'
Enter valid username 'student' in username field
Enter valid password 'Password123' in password field
expected_result: User successfully logs in and sees the dashboard

description: Verify that a user cannot log in with an invalid username
steps: Enter invalid username 'invalidUser' in username field
Enter valid password 'Password123' in password field
expected_result: Error message displayed indicating that username is invalid

description: Verify that a user cannot log in with an invalid password
steps: Enter valid username 'student' in username field
Enter invalid password 'InvalidPassword' in password field
expected_result: Error message displayed indicating that password is invalid

description: Verify that the forgot password functionality works as expected
expected_result: User redirected to forgot password page

description: Verify that the application handles invalid credentials correctly on submit
steps: Enter any random text in username field
Enter any random text in password field
expected_result: Error message displayed indicating that username and/or password is invalid

description: Verify that the application handles empty username correctly on submit
steps: Enter valid password 'Password123' in password field
expected_result: Error message displayed indicating that username is required

description: Verify that the application handles empty password correctly on submit
steps: Enter valid username 'student' in username field
expected_result: Error message displayed indicating that password is required

test_name: Submit Button Click without Filling Credentials
description: Verify that the application handles submit button click correctly when credentials are not filled
expected_result: Error message displayed indicating that username and/or password is required

test_name: Valid Username with Special Characters on Submit
description: Verify that the application handles valid username with special characters correctly on submit
steps: Enter valid username 'student!' in username field
Enter valid password 'Password123' in password field
expected_result: User successfully logs in and sees the dashboard

test_name: Valid Password with Special Characters on Submit
description: Verify that the application handles valid password with special characters correctly on submit
steps: Enter valid username 'student' in username field
Enter valid password 'Password!123' in password field
expected_result: User successfully logs in and sees the dashboard

test_name: Submit Button Click on Empty Username Field with Valid Password
description: Verify that the application handles submit button click correctly when username field is empty and password is valid
steps: Enter valid password 'Password123' in password field
expected_result: Error message displayed indicating that username is required

test_name: Submit Button Click on Empty Password Field with Valid Username
description: Verify that the application handles submit button click correctly when password field is empty and username is valid
steps: Enter valid username 'student' in username field
expected_result: Error message displayed indicating that password is required

test_name: Submit Button Click with Blank Username and Password Fields
description: Verify that the application handles submit button click correctly when both username and password fields are blank
expected_result: Error message displayed indicating that username and/or password is required

description: Verify that the application handles invalid username length correctly on submit
steps: Enter username with more than 50 characters in username field
Enter valid password 'Password123' in password field
expected_result: Error message displayed indicating that username length is invalid

description: Verify that the application handles invalid password length correctly on submit
steps: Enter valid username 'student' in username field
Enter password with more than 50 characters in password field
expected_result: Error message displayed indicating that password length is invalid

description: Verify that the application handles blank username correctly on submit
steps: Enter blank text in username field
Enter valid password 'Password123' in password field
expected_result: Error message displayed indicating that username is required

description: Verify that the application handles blank password correctly on submit
steps: Enter valid username 'student' in username field
expected_result: Error message displayed indicating that password is required
